extension.name: JoomlaBoost - Universal SEO & Performance Plugin
extension.author: JoomlaBoost Team
extension.license: GNU General Public License version 2 or later

field.name: vertical_preset
field.label: Site Type
field.description: Pick a vertical, tick Apply on save below, click Save. Existing IDs and addresses are preserved.

field.name: vertical_preset_apply
field.label: Apply preset on save
field.description: ON: when you click Save, the selected preset will be applied (other fields preserved). OFF: preset selection is ignored.

field.name: show_advanced_options
field.label: Show Advanced Options
field.description: ON reveals power-user fields across all tabs (multilingual, ratings, FAQ JSON, sitemap details, etc.). Click Save after toggling.

field.name: robots_auto_sync
field.label: Auto-Sync robots.txt File
field.description: Automatically update physical robots.txt file to match plugin rules. Recommended to prevent conflicts with Joomla updates.

field.name: schema_url
field.label: Organization URL
field.description: Official website URL (auto-detected if empty)

field.name: schema_email
field.label: Email Address
field.description: Business contact email

field.name: schema_phone
field.label: Phone Number
field.description: Business phone in international format

field.name: schema_social_facebook
field.label: Facebook URL
field.description: Full URL to your Facebook page

field.name: schema_social_instagram
field.label: Instagram URL
field.description: Full URL to your Instagram profile

field.name: schema_social_youtube
field.label: YouTube URL
field.description: Full URL to your YouTube channel

field.name: schema_social_twitter
field.label: Twitter/X URL
field.description: Full URL to your Twitter/X profile

field.name: schema_social_linkedin
field.label: LinkedIn URL
field.description: Full URL to your LinkedIn page

field.name: schema_address_country
field.label: Country Code
field.description: Physical location country code (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2). E.g. RS for Serbia, ME for Montenegro, DE for Germany.

field.name: schema_address_zip
field.label: Postal Code
field.description: ZIP or postal code

field.name: schema_latitude
field.label: Latitude
field.description: Geographic latitude for map schema (e.g., 44.8178)

field.name: schema_longitude
field.label: Longitude
field.description: Geographic longitude for map schema (e.g., 20.4569)

field.name: schema_rating_value
field.label: Average Rating
field.description: Average guest rating (e.g., 4.6). Google shows this in search results and AI Overviews.

field.name: schema_rating_count
field.label: Number of Reviews
field.description: Total number of guest reviews. More reviews = stronger signal for AI search.

field.name: schema_rating_best
field.label: Best Rating (Max)
field.description: Maximum possible rating on the platform (usually 5 or 10)

field.name: schema_rating_worst
field.label: Worst Rating (Min)
field.description: Minimum possible rating (usually 1)

field.name: schema_rating_source
field.label: Rating Source
field.description: Platform where reviews are collected (e.g., Booking.com, Google, TripAdvisor)

field.name: schema_type
field.label: Schema.org Organization Type
field.description: Choose the Schema.org type for your organization. Auto-detect uses site characteristics. Each type outputs the correct structured data for AI and Google rich results.

field.name: schema_hotel_star_rating
field.label: Star Rating
field.description: Hotel star rating (1-5 stars)

field.name: schema_hotel_checkin_time
field.label: Check-in Time
field.description: Standard check-in time (24h format)

field.name: schema_hotel_checkout_time
field.label: Check-out Time
field.description: Standard check-out time (24h format)

field.name: schema_hotel_pets_allowed
field.label: Pets Allowed
field.description: Are pets allowed in the hotel?

field.name: schema_price_range
field.label: Price Range
field.description: Price range indicator for services

field.name: schema_medical_specialty
field.label: Medical Specialty
field.description: Primary medical specialty (e.g., General Practice, Cardiology, Orthopaedics). Used in medicalSpecialty Schema.org field.

field.name: schema_legal_area
field.label: Area of Practice
field.description: Primary legal practice area (e.g., Family Law, Criminal Defence, Corporate Law). Used in serviceType Schema.org field.

field.name: schema_edu_level
field.label: Education Level
field.description: Primary education level offered. Used in educationalLevel Schema.org field.

field.name: schema_job_title
field.label: Job Title / Profession
field.description: Your professional title (e.g., Graphic Designer, Full-Stack Developer, Photographer). Used in jobTitle Schema.org field.

field.name: schema_portfolio_url
field.label: Portfolio URL
field.description: Direct URL to your portfolio or main work page (overrides the site URL in Person schema).

field.name: schema_dental_specialty
field.label: Dental Specialty / Services
field.description: Primary dental specialties or procedures offered (e.g., General Dentistry, Orthodontics, Cosmetic Dentistry). Comma-separated list. Mapped to medicalSpecialty in Schema.org — helps AI engines understand what services you offer.

field.name: schema_realestate_area_served
field.label: Area Served
field.description: Geographic area(s) where the agency operates (e.g., London, Central London, Westminster). Used in areaServed Schema.org field — tells AI engines your geographic coverage.

field.name: schema_realestate_property_types
field.label: Property Types
field.description: Types of properties the agency handles (e.g., Residential, Commercial, Luxury Villas). Comma-separated. Shown in hasOfferCatalog Schema.org field.

field.name: schema_gym_sport
field.label: Primary Sport / Activity
field.description: Main sport or activity offered (e.g., CrossFit, Boxing, Yoga, Mixed Martial Arts). Used in the sport Schema.org field — helps AI engines surface your club in activity-specific queries.

field.name: schema_gym_amenities
field.label: Amenities
field.description: Available facilities and equipment (e.g., Pool, Sauna, Showers, Lockers, Parking). Comma-separated. Generates amenityFeature entries (LocationFeatureSpecification) in Schema.org.

field.name: schema_news_topics
field.label: Editorial Topics
field.description: Main topics covered (e.g., Politics, Technology, Sports). Comma-separated. Used in the about Schema.org field — helps AI engines understand what your publication covers and when to recommend it.

field.name: schema_news_principles
field.label: Publishing Principles URL
field.description: URL to your editorial standards, ethics policy, or about page. Used in publishingPrinciples Schema.org field — signals editorial transparency to AI engines and Google News.

field.name: schema_hours_mode
field.label: Opening Hours Mode
field.description: Simple: enter a plain text string (e.g. Mo-Fr 09:00-17:00). Advanced: configure day-by-day schedule, seasonal hours, and holiday closures — generates proper openingHoursSpecification Schema.org markup.

field.name: schema_opening_hours
field.label: Opening Hours
field.description: Business opening hours in Schema.org format. Examples: Mo-Fr 09:00-17:00 | Mo-Su 00:00-24:00 (24/7) | Mo 08:00-12:00, Tu-Fr 08:00-16:00

field.name: schema_hours_appointment_only
field.label: By Appointment Only
field.description: Mark as appointment-only — outputs openingHours: By Appointment in Schema.org. Hides day-by-day schedule below.

field.name: schema_hours_temp_closed
field.label: Temporarily Closed
field.description: Mark business as temporarily closed — outputs temporarilyClosed: true. Removes all opening hours from Schema.

field.name: schema_hours_mon_open2
field.label: Monday Open (2nd slot — optional split shift)
field.description: Add a second time slot for this day (e.g. afternoon/evening). Leave empty if not needed.

field.name: schema_hours_tue_open2
field.label: Tuesday Open (2nd slot — optional split shift)
field.description: Add a second time slot for this day. Leave empty if not needed.

field.name: schema_hours_wed_open2
field.label: Wednesday Open (2nd slot — optional split shift)
field.description: Add a second time slot for this day. Leave empty if not needed.

field.name: schema_hours_thu_open2
field.label: Thursday Open (2nd slot — optional split shift)
field.description: Add a second time slot for this day. Leave empty if not needed.

field.name: schema_hours_fri_open2
field.label: Friday Open (2nd slot — optional split shift)
field.description: Add a second time slot for this day. Leave empty if not needed.

field.name: schema_hours_sat_open2
field.label: Saturday Open (2nd slot — optional split shift)
field.description: Add a second time slot for Saturday. Leave empty if not needed.

field.name: schema_hours_sun_open2
field.label: Sunday Open (2nd slot — optional split shift)
field.description: Add a second time slot for Sunday. Leave empty if not needed.

field.name: schema_season_from
field.label: Season Start (MM-DD)
field.description: First day of the open season. Format: MM-DD (e.g. 06-01 for June 1st). Leave empty if open all year. Adds validFrom to openingHoursSpecification — ideal for seasonal resorts, ski lodges, beach hotels.

field.name: schema_season_to
field.label: Season End (MM-DD)
field.description: Last day of the open season. Format: MM-DD (e.g. 09-30 for September 30th). Leave empty if open all year.

field.name: schema_holiday_closed
field.label: Closed on Specific Dates
field.description: Dates when the business is closed (public holidays, annual closure, etc.). Enter one date per line in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g. 2026-12-25 for Christmas). Generates specialOpeningHoursSpecification in Schema.org.

field.name: faq_auto_detect
field.label: Auto-Detect FAQ from Content
field.description:
Automatically detect Q&A pairs from article content. Looks for description lists (
/
/
) and headings (

/

followed by

). Generates FAQPage JSON-LD per page. Recommended: YES.

field.name: enable_manual_faqs
field.label: Enable Manual FAQs
field.description: Add custom FAQ items via JSON editor below. These will be merged with auto-detected FAQs.

field.name: manual_faq_scope
field.label: Global FAQ - When to Apply
field.description: Controls on which pages the manually entered FAQ (below) is injected as Schema markup.
field.option: Fallback on all pages - show global FAQ on any page without auto-detected FAQ
All pages - always inject global FAQ, ignore auto-detect
Homepage fallback - show global FAQ on homepage only, if no auto-detected FAQ
Homepage only - always inject global FAQ on homepage, ignore auto-detect
Disabled - global FAQ is saved but never injected into Schema

field.name: faq_json_help
field.label: JSON Format Help
field.description: Format: Array of objects. Example: [{"question": "What?", "answer": "This!"}]. Note: Auto-detected FAQs from article content are already translated by Falang automatically.

field.name: schema_events_enabled
field.label: Enable Event Schema
field.description: Inject Event JSON-LD schema on all pages. Events appear in Google rich results, Google Maps, and AI Overviews. Configure events via JSON below.

field.name: schema_events_help
field.label: Event JSON Fields
field.description: Required per event: name, startDate. Optional: endDate, description, url, location (defaults to organization address), price, currency (default EUR). Dates must be ISO 8601 format.

field.name: sitemap_menu_depth
field.label: Menu Depth
field.description: How deep to follow menu items (0 = all levels)

field.name: sitemap_menu_types
field.label: Select Menus
field.description: Choose which menus to include (empty = all menus)
field.query: SELECT menutype AS value, title FROM #__menu_types ORDER BY title

field.name: sitemap_article_categories
field.label: Select Categories
field.description: Choose categories (empty = all)

field.name: sitemap_exclude_ids
field.label: Exclude Article IDs
field.description: Comma-separated IDs (e.g., 1,5,12)

field.name: sitemap_max_articles
field.label: Max Articles
field.description: 0 = unlimited

field.name: sitemap_hreflang
field.label: Add hreflang to Sitemap
field.description: Add xhtml:link hreflang alternate tags for each URL in all active languages. Requires Joomla Language Filter plugin active. Works with Falang and native Joomla multilingual. Default: OFF.

field.name: og_override_note
field.label: Per-Article OpenGraph Overrides
field.description: To override OpenGraph meta tags for specific articles, use Joomla Custom Fields (com_fields). Create fields named: custom_og_image, custom_og_title, custom_og_description. Priority: Custom Fields → Featured Image → Global Config.

field.name: meta_pixel_id
field.label: Meta Pixel ID (Primary)
field.description: Your primary Meta (Facebook) Pixel ID

field.name: meta_pixel_id_2
field.label: Meta Pixel ID (Secondary — optional)
field.description: Second Pixel ID if you need to track two accounts simultaneously (e.g. agency + client). Leave empty if not needed.

field.name: pixel_consent_mode
field.label: GDPR Consent Mode
field.description: How Meta Pixel is injected in relation to GDPR consent.

field.name: fb_domain_verification
field.label: Facebook Domain Verification Code
field.description: Enter the verification code from Facebook Business Manager (without the meta tag markup)

field.name: gsc_verification_meta
field.label: Google Site Verification Code (Primary)
field.description: Paste only the content value from the meta tag: <meta name='google-site-verification' content='PASTE_THIS_VALUE'/>

field.name: gsc_verification_meta_2
field.label: Google Site Verification Code (Secondary — optional)
field.description: Second verification code if you have two Google Search Console properties. Leave empty if not needed.

field.name: ga4_consent_mode
field.label: GDPR Consent Mode
field.description: How GA4 is injected in relation to GDPR consent. NONE: injected immediately, no consent control. YOOTHEME: script is blocked until user accepts Statistics in YooTheme consent banner. GTM: skip direct GA4, let GTM handle it with its own consent settings.

field.name: gtm_container_id
field.label: PLG_SYSTEM_JOOMLABOOST_GTM_CONTAINER_ID_LABEL
field.description: GTM Container ID (format: GTM-XXXXXXX). NOTE: If YooTheme also has GA4 configured in its own Customizer integrations, disable GA4 here (or use mode Via GTM) to avoid duplicate tracking.

field.name: indexnow_enabled
field.label: Enable IndexNow
field.description: Automatically notify Bing, Yandex and Seznam when content is published or updated. Requires a valid API key.

field.name: indexnow_key_generator
indexnow_api_key
field.label: IndexNow API Key
field.description: Your unique IndexNow key. The plugin will create the required verification file at your site root automatically.

field.name: indexnow_note
field.label: How IndexNow Works
field.description: Save plugin → key file auto-created → every published article is instantly pinged to Bing/Yandex/Seznam. AI search engines discover new content in minutes, not days.

field.name: separator_llmstxt
field.label: LLMs.txt — AI Crawler Visibility (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity)

field.name: llmstxt_enabled
field.label: Generate /llms.txt
field.description: Creates a structured /llms.txt file at the site root that helps AI systems (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini) understand your site's content and structure.

field.name: llmstxt_note
field.label: How LLMs.txt Works
field.description: An emerging AI standard (llmstxt.org). JoomlaBoost auto-fills it with org data, menu pages, ratings, contact & social links. Visit yourdomain.com/llms.txt to verify after saving.
